name: Salesforce
one_liner: CRM and Sales: A cloud-based CRM platform helping businesses manage customer relationships, sales pipeline, and integrations.
gating: Self-serve (Free 30-day Developer Edition environment available to anyone)
api_surface: REST API, SOAP API, GraphQL API. Extremely broad surface covering all platform objects. Several existing community and official MCP servers.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable, though complex permission settings and OAuth scopes can be a developer challenge.

name: HubSpot
one_liner: CRM and Sales: Customer platform providing tools for marketing, sales, service, and content management.
auth: OAuth2, API Key (Private App Access Tokens)
gating: Self-serve (Free developer test accounts can be created instantly)
api_surface: REST API. Very broad surface across contacts, deals, tickets, and CRM objects. Standard official HubSpot MCP server available.
verdict: Yes. Fully buildable with Private App tokens for personal apps and OAuth for public applications.

name: Pipedrive
one_liner: CRM and Sales: A web-based CRM and pipeline management software for sales teams.
gating: Self-serve (Free developer sandbox accounts available via Partner Portal)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface covering deals, leads, organizations, and activities. Existing community MCP servers.
verdict: Yes. Very developer-friendly; API tokens are easy to generate for quick agent integrations.

name: Attio
one_liner: CRM and Sales: A customizable, data-driven CRM built for modern startups and teams.
gating: Self-serve (Free plan allows generating API keys instantly from workspace settings)
api_surface: REST API. Moderately broad surface focused on records, attributes, and relationships. Community MCP server available.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable today; excellent Developer Experience with simple API token setup.

name: Twenty
one_liner: CRM and Sales: An open-source, modern CRM designed to be fully customizable and self-hostable.
gating: Self-serve (Fully free to self-host, or free developer trials on the cloud version)
api_surface: REST API, GraphQL API. Broad, auto-generated schema based on active database objects. Existing MCP server available.
verdict: Yes. Excellent for agent toolkit buildability since it is open-source and has no licensing restrictions.

name: Podio
one_liner: CRM and Sales: A flexible, collaborative work management and CRM platform by Citrix.
gating: Self-serve (Free trial and developer keys generated directly in user accounts)
api_surface: REST API. Very broad surface including workspaces, apps, items, and tasks. Existing MCP integrations.
verdict: Yes. Buildable, but uses a unique app-level auth mechanism alongside user OAuth.

name: Zoho CRM
one_liner: CRM and Sales: A comprehensive sales CRM for managing contacts, deals, and business operations.
gating: Self-serve (Free developer edition/test account, plus Self-Client token generator)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across standard and custom modules. Existing Zoho CRM MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable, though token expiration and regional domain redirection (multi-DC) are challenges.

name: Close
one_liner: CRM and Sales: A CRM focused on inside sales, featuring built-in calling, emailing, and SMS.
gating: Self-serve (Free 14-day trial with full access to API settings)
api_surface: REST API. Moderately broad surface focused on leads, opportunities, tasks, and activities. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Easily buildable using API keys from the settings panel.

name: Copper
one_liner: CRM and Sales: A CRM built specifically for Google Workspace users to track leads and relations.
gating: Self-serve (Free trial available; API keys generated under Admin Settings)
api_surface: REST API. Moderately broad surface across leads, opportunities, people, and activities. No official MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable today; uses a custom header authentication (`X-PW-UserEmail` and `X-PW-AccessToken`).

name: DealCloud
one_liner: CRM and Sales: A specialized CRM for investment banking, private equity, and deal management.
gating: Gated (Requires active paid enterprise subscription, admin approval, and developer credentials generated by admin)
api_surface: REST API. Narrow to moderately broad surface defined by enterprise tenant schema. No existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Developer sandbox requires paid setup; main blocker is the enterprise partnership barrier.

name: Zendesk
one_liner: Support and Helpdesk: A customer service and support ticket management platform.
gating: Self-serve (Free trial accounts can register and generate API tokens instantly)
api_surface: REST API, GraphQL (Sunshine). Extremely broad surface covering tickets, users, macros, and help articles. Several existing MCP servers.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable and widely integrated in agent ecosystems.

name: Intercom
one_liner: Support and Helpdesk: A customer communication and chat platform for support, marketing, and sales.
gating: Self-serve (Free developer workspace available under developer program)
api_surface: REST API. Very broad surface covering conversations, contacts, articles, and admin actions. Official and community MCP servers exist.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; developer access tokens allow direct connection to dev workspaces.

name: Freshdesk
one_liner: Support and Helpdesk: An easy-to-use customer support software with ticket tracking.
gating: Self-serve (Free 21-day trial with full access to profile API keys)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across tickets, contacts, companies, and agents. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable using simple API key headers.

name: Front
one_liner: Support and Helpdesk: A customer operations platform that brings emails, chat, and SMS into a shared inbox.
gating: Self-serve (Free developer sandbox workspaces can be requested online)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface including inboxes, messages, analytics, and contact lists. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable with clear documentation and dedicated sandboxes.

name: Pylon
one_liner: Support and Helpdesk: Customer support platform tracking issues across Slack, Teams, and email.
gating: Gated (Requires enterprise account or contact sales to get sandboxes or API access)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface covering issues, customers, and message sync. No existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes, but gated. The main blocker is the sales gate to access a trial/sandbox for testing.

name: LiveAgent
one_liner: Support and Helpdesk: An omni-channel helpdesk software with live chat and ticket management.
gating: Self-serve (Free 14-day trial with access to API key generation)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface covering tickets, chats, departments, and agents. No existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable today; simple HTTP header authentication.

name: Plain
one_liner: Support and Helpdesk: A modern, API-first customer support platform built for technical teams.
gating: Self-serve (Free tier available; developer keys generated instantly in settings)
api_surface: GraphQL API. Moderate surface focused on threads, customers, events, and labels. No official MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; API-first design makes it an ideal match for LLM tools.

name: Help Scout
one_liner: Support and Helpdesk: A customer support platform with shared inbox, docs, and beacon chat.
gating: Self-serve (Free 15-day trial available; OAuth credentials created in profile)
api_surface: REST API. Moderately broad surface for conversations, mailboxes, and customers. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable; requires OAuth2 client credentials or authorization code flow.

name: Gorgias
one_liner: Support and Helpdesk: An ecommerce-focused helpdesk that integrates with Shopify, Magento, and BigCommerce.
gating: Self-serve (Free 7-day trial; API keys found in Settings -> Rest API)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface including tickets, customers, and order context. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; simple API credential generation.

name: Gladly
one_liner: Support and Helpdesk: A people-centric customer service platform that focuses on conversation history.
gating: Gated (Enterprise subscription and admin approval required; no free developer sandbox)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across customer profiles, conversations, and agents. No existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes, but gated. The main blocker is the lack of a free self-serve sandbox for developers.

name: Slack
one_liner: Communications and Messaging: A workspace chat and collaboration platform.
gating: Self-serve (Free workspace creation allows bot token generation instantly)
api_surface: REST API, WebSockets (Socket Mode). Extremely broad surface (channels, messages, files, users). Official and community MCP servers exist.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; one of the most mature API developer platforms.

name: Twilio
one_liner: Communications and Messaging: APIs for SMS, voice calls, video, and multi-channel messaging.
auth: API Key, Basic (Account SID / Auth Token)
gating: Self-serve (Free trial account with trial credits given instantly)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface covering phone numbers, SMS, Voice, and WhatsApp. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable today; very developer-friendly.

name: Zoho Cliq
one_liner: Communications and Messaging: A team communication and collaboration tool by Zoho.
gating: Self-serve (Free tier available; tokens generated under developer console)
api_surface: REST API. Moderately broad surface for channels, messages, bots, and extensions. No existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable today; requires OAuth2 credentials.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
one_liner: Communications and Messaging: An enterprise collaboration suite by ByteDance featuring chat, docs, and calendar.
auth: OAuth2 (Tenant Access Token, User Access Token)
gating: Self-serve (Free developer accounts and custom apps can be created easily)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface covering messages, records, sheets, and users. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; excellent Developer Hub.

name: Pumble
one_liner: Communications and Messaging: A free-tier team chat application similar to Slack.
gating: Self-serve (Free workspace plan; API credentials generated in administration console)
api_surface: REST API. Moderately broad surface for channels, messages, and users. No existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable today; API behaves similarly to Slack's core model.

name: Discord
one_liner: Communications and Messaging: A community voice, video, and text communication platform.
gating: Self-serve (Free developer applications created instantly)
api_surface: REST API, Gateway (WebSockets). Extremely broad surface (channels, messages, servers, voice). Existing MCP servers.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; Bot model is extremely powerful for agent interaction.

name: Telegram
one_liner: Communications and Messaging: A fast and secure instant messaging app.
auth: Bot Token (API Key), MTProto API credentials
gating: Self-serve (Bots are generated instantly and for free via BotFather)
api_surface: HTTP Bot API (REST-like), MTProto client API. Broad surface for messaging, media, and channels. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; Telegram Bot API is extremely simple for agent integrations.

name: WhatsApp Business
one_liner: Communications and Messaging: Business communication APIs for WhatsApp messaging by Meta.
gating: Self-serve (Meta Developer Portal; free sandbox test numbers provided instantly)
api_surface: REST API (Graph API). Broad surface for templates, media, and messages. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable, but setup (Meta developer portal, business manager verification) is a high-friction gate.

name: Aircall
one_liner: Communications and Messaging: Cloud-based call center software for sales and support teams.
gating: Self-serve (Free trial allows token generation; API keys found in dashboard)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface for calls, contacts, users, and numbers. No official MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable; uses basic auth with token credential headers.

name: Vonage
one_liner: Communications and Messaging: Communications platform offering APIs for SMS, voice, video, and verification.
auth: API Key (App ID / Private Key JWT / API Key)
gating: Self-serve (Free trial credits upon signing up to developer dashboard)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across multiple communication channels. No official MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; standard API credentials.

name: Google Ads
one_liner: Marketing, Ads, Email and Social: Online advertising platform by Google.
gating: Gated (Developer token requires application and manual review, though basic test accounts can be self-serve)
api_surface: REST API, gRPC. Extremely broad surface for campaigns, bidding, and analytics. No existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Blocker is the developer token review process and complex OAuth setup.

name: Meta Ads
one_liner: Marketing, Ads, Email and Social: Advertising platform for Facebook, Instagram, and Messenger.
gating: Self-serve (Meta Developer Account; API keys are generated under App Settings)
api_surface: REST API (Graph API). Broad surface for campaign management, audiences, and insights. No existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable, but app review is required for live production campaigns.

name: LinkedIn Ads
one_liner: Marketing, Ads, Email and Social: B2B advertising platform on LinkedIn.
gating: Gated (Requires application approval in the Developer Portal to access Marketing Developer Platform)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface for campaigns, creatives, and analytics. No existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Blocker is the manual developer portal approval process.

name: GoHighLevel
one_liner: Marketing, Ads, Email and Social: All-in-one sales and marketing platform for agencies.

api_surface: REST API. Very broad surface across contacts, pipeline, calendar, and email templates. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable with the newer v2 API.

name: Mailchimp
one_liner: Marketing, Ads, Email and Social: Email marketing and automation platform.
gating: Self-serve (Free plan allows generating API keys instantly from account settings)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across lists, campaigns, reports, and templates. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable using simple API key access.

name: Klaviyo
one_liner: Marketing, Ads, Email and Social: Customer platform for email, SMS, and push marketing.
gating: Self-serve (Free accounts can generate API keys directly in settings)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across metrics, profiles, campaigns, and templates. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; clean modern API endpoints.

name: systeme.io
one_liner: Marketing, Ads, Email and Social: An all-in-one funnel builder and email marketing tool.

api_surface: REST API. Narrow surface for managing contacts and subscriptions. No official MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable today; simple REST endpoints.

name: Pinterest
one_liner: Marketing, Ads, Email and Social: Visual discovery and social media advertising platform.

api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface for pins, boards, campaigns, and ads reporting. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Buildable; standard OAuth client configuration.

name: Threads (Meta)
one_liner: Marketing, Ads, Email and Social: Meta's text-based social media platform.
gating: Self-serve (Meta Developer Account; API access set up under Threads app type)
api_surface: REST API (Graph API). Narrow surface for publishing media, retrieving posts, and analytics. No existing MCP.
verdict: Yes. Buildable; setup is linked to the standard Meta App dashboard.

name: SendGrid
one_liner: Marketing, Ads, Email and Social: Transactional and marketing email delivery service.
gating: Self-serve (Free account gives API key access immediately)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across email sending, stats, templates, and domain settings. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; API-key auth is straightforward.

name: Shopify
one_liner: Ecommerce: A global commerce platform helping merchants set up online stores and sell.
gating: Self-serve (Free developer stores via Shopify Partners)
api_surface: GraphQL API, REST API. Extremely broad surface. Standard official and community MCP servers exist.

name: WooCommerce
one_liner: Ecommerce: An open-source ecommerce plugin built on WordPress.
gating: Self-serve (Free open-source software; API keys generated locally in WordPress settings)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across products, orders, customers, and coupons. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; self-hosted setup has no developer cost gates.

name: BigCommerce
one_liner: Ecommerce: A SaaS-based open ecommerce platform for enterprise and mid-market brands.
gating: Self-serve (Developer sandbox stores can be created via Partner Program)
api_surface: REST API, GraphQL. Broad surface across storefront, catalogs, and orders. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Buildable today; requires API client tokens.

name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
one_liner: Ecommerce: Enterprise-level ecommerce platform by Salesforce.
gating: Gated (Requires active enterprise customer subscription/sandboxes; no free public trial)
api_surface: REST API (OCAPI & SCAPI). Broad surface for storefront and basket operations. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Blocker is the lack of public self-serve sandbox environments.

name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
one_liner: Ecommerce: Flexible open-source and enterprise ecommerce platform by Adobe.
gating: Self-serve (Open-source version is free to self-host and test)
api_surface: REST API, GraphQL. Broad surface covering catalog, checkout, and inventory. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Buildable; self-hosting allows unlimited developer testing.

name: Squarespace
one_liner: Ecommerce: Website building and ecommerce hosting platform.
gating: Gated (API key generation requires a paid Website Business or Commerce plan)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface for orders, inventory, and profiles. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Blocker is the paid subscription barrier to access the developer keys.

name: Ecwid
one_liner: Ecommerce: A shopping cart widget that can be embedded into any website.
gating: Self-serve (Free developer accounts are available with full API access)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface covering store configuration, products, and orders. No official MCP.

name: Gumroad
one_liner: Ecommerce: Simple platform for creators to sell digital products, subscriptions, and memberships.
gating: Self-serve (Tokens can be generated instantly in user settings page)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface across products, sales, subscribers, and licenses. No official MCP.

name: Amazon Selling Partner
one_liner: Ecommerce: APIs for sellers and vendors on the Amazon marketplace.
gating: Gated (Requires Amazon Professional Seller account, developer registration, and security review)
api_surface: REST API (SP-API). Extremely broad surface covering listings, orders, fulfillment, and reports. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes, but extremely high-friction. Blocker is the professional seller fee ($40/mo), IAM configurations, and security verification.

name: fanbasis
one_liner: Ecommerce: Digital experience platform for fan monetization, custom interactions, and merch.
gating: Self-serve (Developer account signup is open to the public)
api_surface: REST API. Narrow surface for campaigns and fan engagement items. No official MCP.

name: DataForSEO
one_liner: Data, SEO and Scraping: API provider for SEO, SERP, and digital marketing data.
gating: Self-serve (Free trial account with trial credits given instantly)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across rankings, keywords, search volume, and merchant data. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Buildable today using basic auth credentials.

name: SE Ranking
one_liner: Data, SEO and Scraping: All-in-one SEO platform with rank tracking and keyword tools.
gating: Gated (API access is restricted to paid subscriptions and high-tier plans)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface for rankings, site audit, and analytics. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Blocker is the paid subscription barrier to unlock API access.

name: Ahrefs
one_liner: Data, SEO and Scraping: Backlink checker and SEO tool suite.
gating: Gated (API access requires high-tier paid plan - Enterprise/Advanced)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface covering backlinks, keywords, and traffic. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Blocker is the high paid-gate ($1,000s/yr) required for API tokens.

name: MrScraper
one_liner: Data, SEO and Scraping: Visual web scraping tool and automated web scraper.
gating: Self-serve (Free trial available; tokens generated in user settings)
api_surface: REST API. Narrow surface for triggering scrapers and fetching results. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Buildable; simple API key header.

name: Apify
one_liner: Data, SEO and Scraping: Cloud platform for web scraping, data extraction, and web automation.
gating: Self-serve (Free tier available; tokens found in account settings)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across actors, runs, datasets, and tasks. Existing MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; ideal tool for agents to run custom scraper actors.

name: Firecrawl
one_liner: Data, SEO and Scraping: An API to crawl and convert websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data.

name: Bright Data

api_surface: REST API. Moderately broad surface for proxy management and scraping APIs. No official MCP.

name: Sherlock
one_liner: Data, SEO and Scraping: Open-source username OSINT tool that scans social media profiles.

api_surface: CLI Tool / Python script. No hosted SaaS API surface; execution is local. No existing MCP.
verdict: Yes (as a local tool). Blocker for SaaS API: It is a local command-line script, not a web service.

name: Waterfall.io

verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; API key integration is straightforward.

auth: OAuth2, Token (Personal Access Tokens / GitHub Apps)

name: Netlify

api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across sites, deploys, webhooks, and forms. No official MCP.

name: Cloudflare

api_surface: REST API. Very broad surface across DNS, Workers, Pages, and firewalls. Existing MCP server.

name: Plaid
one_liner: Finance and Fintech: Financial data network connecting banking apps with user accounts.
auth: API Key (Client ID / Secret / Public Key)
gating: Self-serve (Free sandbox access with unlimited test keys, though production keys need approval)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across accounts, transactions, identity, and liabilities. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; sandbox is fully self-serve.

name: Binance
one_liner: Finance and Fintech: Cryptocurrency exchange platform APIs.
gating: Self-serve (API keys generated in profile; free SPOT API testnets exist)
api_surface: REST API, WebSockets. Broad surface across spot/futures trading and account info. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Buildable, but signing requests with HMAC signatures requires custom tool logic.

name: Paygent Connect
one_liner: Finance and Fintech: Payment gateway in Japan powered by NMI.
gating: Gated (Enterprise partnership required; requires business registration and contact sales)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface for credit card processing and transactions. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Blocker is the strict corporate registration gate in Japan.

name: iPayX
one_liner: Finance and Fintech: Cloud billing and custom payment portal APIs.
gating: Gated (Requires sales outreach; no self-serve sandbox for developers)
api_surface: REST API. Narrow billing and transaction surface. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Blocker is the enterprise-only sales wall.

name: QuickBooks
one_liner: Finance and Fintech: Cloud accounting software for small businesses by Intuit.
gating: Self-serve (Free developer portal and sandbox accounts created instantly)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across invoices, customers, vendors, and ledger accounts. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; sandbox is fully functional.

name: Xero
one_liner: Finance and Fintech: Cloud accounting software for small and medium businesses.
gating: Self-serve (Free developer accounts with access to Demo Company sandboxes)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across contacts, invoices, bank transactions, and reports. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; sandboxes are free and open.

name: Brex
one_liner: Finance and Fintech: Corporate credit cards and spend management platform.
gating: Self-serve (Sandbox available, API keys generated under developer settings)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface for transactions, accounts, vendors, and user onboarding. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable today.

name: Ramp
one_liner: Finance and Fintech: Corporate card, expense management, and bill pay software.
gating: Self-serve (Free developer sandbox workspaces can be created directly)
api_surface: REST API. Broad surface across transactions, cards, expenses, and departments. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable with clear developer access.

name: PitchBook
one_liner: Finance and Fintech: Financial data platform covering private market capital, PE, and VC.
gating: Gated (Enterprise subscription and outreach required; extremely high cost gate)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface for company financial records and deals. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Blocker is the high-cost sales firewall.

name: NotebookLM
one_liner: AI, Research and Media-native: AI research assistant by Google. API features map to Google Cloud Enterprise Gemini APIs.
auth: API Key (Google Cloud IAM / Gemini API)
gating: Gated (Consumer NotebookLM lacks a public API; Enterprise API is gated under Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise)
api_surface: Enterprise API. Broad under Google Cloud Vertex / Gemini API. No standalone consumer NotebookLM API.
verdict: No. Blocker: NotebookLM itself has no public standalone API; developer access is only for the raw Gemini API.

name: Otter AI
one_liner: AI, Research and Media-native: AI meeting assistant and transcription tool.
gating: Gated (API access is restricted to Enterprise plans and requires administrative approval)
api_surface: REST API. Narrow surface for managing folders and retrieving transcripts. Existing community MCP server.
verdict: Yes, but gated. Blocker is the enterprise plan requirement and administrative gating.

name: Fathom
one_liner: AI, Research and Media-native: AI meeting recorder and transcription tool for Zoom, Teams, and Meet.
gating: Self-serve (Free accounts can request API access and generate keys in dashboard)
api_surface: REST API. Narrow surface for retrieving meeting recordings and transcripts. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable.

name: Consensus
one_liner: AI, Research and Media-native: AI search engine for scientific research.
gating: Self-serve (Developer setup and API keys are accessible in User Integrations)
api_surface: REST API. Narrow search query and paper citation surface. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable today.

name: Reducto
one_liner: AI, Research and Media-native: Document parsing API converting PDFs/docs into structured JSON.
gating: Self-serve (Free trial with free credits upon user registration)
api_surface: REST API. Narrow document processing and extraction surface. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; designed for LLM data workflows.

name: Devin
one_liner: AI, Research and Media-native: AI software engineer capable of writing code and managing repositories.
gating: Self-serve (Currently in developer beta; keys generated in Devin Developer dashboard)
api_surface: REST API. Moderate surface for starting sessions and posting messages. Existing official MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; has dedicated MCP.

name: higgsfield
one_liner: AI, Research and Media-native: AI-powered video generator tool suite for content creators.
gating: Self-serve (Free accounts can use the CLI or web UI; API keys created in profile)
api_surface: REST API. Narrow video generation surface. Existing official MCP server.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable; has dedicated MCP support.

name: Mermaid CLI
one_liner: AI, Research and Media-native: Command-line tool to compile Mermaid.js diagram definitions into images.
gating: Self-serve (Completely free open-source CLI utility on GitHub)
api_surface: CLI tool. No hosted SaaS API surface; execution is local. No existing MCP.
verdict: Yes (as a local CLI skill). Blocker for SaaS API: It is a local command-line script, not a web service.

name: YouTube Transcript
one_liner: AI, Research and Media-native: Third-party API service providing fast access to YouTube video transcripts.
gating: Self-serve (Free tier credits available on signup)
api_surface: REST API. Narrow video parsing surface. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Buildable today; simple REST endpoint.

name: Grain
one_liner: AI, Research and Media-native: AI meeting recording and summarization platform for workspaces.
gating: Self-serve (Free tier allows generating tokens in settings)
api_surface: REST API. Moderately broad surface across meetings, transcripts, and highlights. No official MCP.
verdict: Yes. Highly buildable.
